notes: Ported from the original Cashiro LazyPayParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/LazyPayParser.kt). LazyPay is an Indian Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) wallet service; like the original (and JuspayParser/Amazon Pay), every transaction is typed CREDIT so wallet spends aren't double-counted against the funding bank account. Porting notes: - canHandle uses contains("LZYPAY") || contains("LAZYPAY"); senders list the documented ids (BP-LZYPAY-S, JM-LZYPAY-S, JD-LZYPAY-S) and dltPatterns cover the contains() checks. - LazyPayParser.isTransactionMessage skips failure messages outright, and skips promos ("offer"/"get cashback"/"explore more") UNLESS the body also contains "payment of" or "was successful". Since requireAnyKeyword already demands one of the transaction phrases, the promo branch is reproduced without explicit promo excludeKeywords: a promo lacking a transaction phrase fails requireAnyKeyword anyway. (Edge case deviation: a promo body containing "against your lazypay statement" or "thanks for your payment" but neither allow-back phrase would be rejected by Kotlin yet accepted here; no such SMS format is known.) - Kotlin's special-case merchant mapping (Zepto Marketplace -> Zepto, Innovative Retail Concepts -> BigBasket, Swiggy, Zomato) is ported as setFieldWhen pipeline steps; they test the whole body rather than just the extracted merchant segment, a faithful approximation since the segment comes from the body. - The generic-suffix cleanup (Private/Pvt/Ltd/... and trailing numbers) is ported to cleaning.stripPatterns. - super.extractAmount/extractReference/extractMerchant fallbacks are not ported: the LazyPay-specific Rs-amount and "txn <id>" patterns cover every known LazyPay format, and the merchant default is "LazyPay" (fallbackField). - LazyPay is a wallet: messages carry no account number, so accountLast4 falls back to "0000" (see jiopay.ts for the rationale).

fixtures.name: purchase with special-cased merchant (Zepto Marketplace)
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs. 235.76 for txn TXN512924131 on Zepto Marketplace Private Limited was successful. Thank you for using LazyPay!

fixtures.name: purchase with generic merchant suffix cleanup
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs 1,499.00 for txn TXN98765432 on Cult Fit Healthcare Pvt Ltd was successful via LazyPay.

fixtures.name: statement repayment confirmation
fixtures.body: Thanks for your payment of Rs. 5,000.00 against your LazyPay statement. Your dues are now cleared.

fixtures.name: failed payment is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Payment of Rs. 350.00 for txn TXN11122233 on Swiggy could not be processed due to a failure. Please retry from the LazyPay app.

fixtures.name: promotional cashback message is filter-rejected
fixtures.body: Get cashback up to Rs. 100 on your next LazyPay transaction! Explore more offers in the LazyPay app today.
